positive: Minimalist vector illustration of a rising sun casting long, dramatic silhouettes of stylized mountains and exotic palms across a calm, deep indigo ocean horizon. The scene uses a limited, high-contrast color palette: burnt orange, soft gold, deep navy, and sky blue. Emphasis on clean lines, geometric shapes, and strong negative space. The composition is centered and symmetrical, ideal for screen printing on a dark t-shirt. Style: Clean geometric vector art, pop-art graphic design, perfect for apparel.
